params.context: Batch F-5: meta (Meta AI) baseline. Previously REGION_INACCESSIBLE (KR blocked). Re-check accessibility — chatglm precedent showed REGION classification can become outdated. If reachable: standard warning render check + capture protocol. If unreachable (region block landing page or VPN required): confirm REGION_INACCESSIBLE.

devtools_check_instructions: 2. Check landing — region block message or chat UI?
3. If chat UI: F12 → Network → send prompt → capture
4. If region block: capture screenshot of block page

notes: Batch F-5 meta baseline + REGION re-check (chatglm precedent).
